prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document primarily addresses school governance and academy trustee recruitment practices that are specific to England, which may not align with the devolved education policies and governance structures in Scotland. Scotland has its own distinct system of governance for schools and trusts, thereby making this guidance inapplicable.
